evals.expected_output: Should flag: (1) Missing businessId in all 3 queries — multi-tenancy violation, (2) Missing @Roles() decorator — open to all auth users, (3) No @Throttle() on export endpoint, (4) No pagination on findMany — could OOM on large customers, (5) No transaction needed (read-only) so that's fine

Should flag: (1) No webhook signature verification — CRITICAL, (2) No transaction around booking update + payment create, (3) booking could be null (findFirst might return null), (4) No idempotency — replayed webhook creates duplicate payment, (5) Missing businessId on payment create, (6) No rate limiting

Should flag: (1) Prompt injection — customer name and question embedded directly, (2) Unbounded history (no take limit on findMany), (3) No try/catch on claudeClient.complete, (4) JSON.parse without validation — parsed.answer could be undefined, (5) dailyCalls uses in-memory Map not Redis, (6) No @MaxLength on question input, (7) Missing businessId on message query, (8) customer.lastConversationId could be null
